name: @wc/contracts
description: OpenAPI contract source of truth. TS types generated via openapi-typescript; Java via openapi-generator-maven-plugin (group 7).

scripts.verify:ts: openapi-typescript openapi.yaml -o /tmp/wc-contracts-check.d.ts && cmp -s /tmp/wc-contracts-check.d.ts generated/types.d.ts || (echo 'TS contract drift -- run yarn workspace @wc/contracts generate:ts' && exit 1)
